top_5_songs_before_going_out: Someone to Call My Lover by Janet Jackson, House Tour by Sabrina Carpenter, Last Night by Ricky Montgomery, So Hot You’re Hurting My Feelings by Caroline Polachek, Stacy’s Mom by Fountains of Wayne
party_likes: I like that my friends are there :-) my friends also coincidentally have great taste in music! I’ve also really liked the snacks and drinks at parties. It’s even better if the party is happening at a house.
parties_dislikes: I HATE when parties have super loud music and flashing lights. You can’t talk to anyone! The lights hurt my head too :(
party_playlist_intent: It depends on the party. I don’t throw ragers (I barely throw parties), so I mostly go for ambience. Something nice in the background that people can talk over :-)
reason_for_going_to_parties: To spend time with friends (people I know) :-) I don’t really go to parties to make new friends.
top_5_songs_when_hosting_party: All I Ever Asked by Rachel Chinouriri, Love is Everywhere by Magadalena Bay, Let’s Stay Together by Al Green, Caramel by Conan Gray, Heart of Glass by Blondie
party_experience_sober: Yes. Honestly, I prefer to be sober at parties because alcohol makes me sleepy. I’m usually more engaged and at parties for longer when I’m sober. I mostly drink to taste the drinks, not to be inebriated.

top_5_songs_before_going_out: High life by daft punk, We are the people by empire of the sun,  Stockholm Syndrome by muse, loving machine by TV Girl,  la puerta by Luis Miguel
party_likes: To see everyone I know and maybe people I don’t know that I  could talk to them and become friends with them

top_5_songs_before_going_out: i’ll take it -sophia steel, 27a pitfield st- bassvictim, been like this-doja cat, like a taxi- cece natalie, 21+ slyy stone
party_likes: environment and loudness. the vibes are good and i like loud bassy music. i also just like seeing a bunch of ppl enjoying time together whether by listening to music or talking to each other.
parties_dislikes: sometimes it gets hot and sweaty. i also don’t like how cramped it gets. i don’t like paying for a party either. i don’t like when ppl lurk or try to get to know me at parties 😭. i will interact and chat w ppl but i mainly just wanna enjoy my time with myself and friends.
party_playlist_intent: depends on what type of party it is but i would want it to match the vibe. a small party with friends i’d want it to be background music. if its a party that is more hype and then i would choose songs that promote dancing and singing. ig based on my songs if i hosted i would host a banger.
reason_for_going_to_parties: To spend time with my friends and have some fun. i feel like almost everyone is too drunk or high to notice the little things so it feels easier to let loose and have fun.
top_5_songs_when_hosting_party: throw sum mo- swae lee, we found love- rihanna, 365 ft shygirl- charli xcx, i love it- icona pop, don’t stop the music-rihanna
party_experience_sober: no

preferred_genre_parties: Country / Folk, Pop, Bachata/Salsa/Regional Mexican Music
top_5_songs_before_going_out: Irreplaceable(Beyonce), Can’t Remember To Forget You(Shakira/Rihanna), Inolvidable(Reik), Chantaje(Shakira/Maluma), You(Romeo Santos)
party_likes: The music or setlist and the environment, so far everyone has been so welcoming and kind when you make eye contact and sing. Or when some group will randomly cheer you on.
parties_dislikes: I like that you can meet a variety of new people but when we’re  crammed together, there is no longer space for dancing. Also, I wouldn’t stay at a party that you can feel judgment or hostility in the environment.
party_playlist_intent: Dancing, singing,
reason_for_going_to_parties: To step away from my routine and to make memories with my closest friends.
top_5_songs_when_hosting_party: El Liston De Tu Pelo(Los Angeles Azules), 20 Rosas(Los Angeles Azules), Pose(D Yankee), Fuera Del Planeta(Randy Nota Loca/Eloy), Desvelado(Bobby Pulido)
party_experience_sober: I liked that I was able to have a good time without having a drink or two. I was more aware of my surroundings and present in the moment with others. And I didn’t feel as exhausted as compared to the version of me that has spent the night drinking.

parties_dislikes: sometimes it can get overwhelming when there are too many people and if theyre all in groups

top_5_songs_before_going_out: The Way I Are - Timbaland, Diva - Beyonce, Disturbia - Rihanna, Rabiosa - Shakira, You Make Me Feel... - Cobra Starship
party_likes: I've liked how everyone is down to speak to each other and dedicate time to having fun. I've liked everyone thats been on aux and the general environment is very comfortable, welcoming, and energetic.
parties_dislikes: I usually don't like it if the music is too loud or too quiet, if theres bad ventilation, if the people are not open and socialising, and if the music is just not really party music or just stuck to one genre.
party_playlist_intent: I try to include crowd favourites that I know everyone will enjoy. I also try to include high energy music or something with a good beat to dance along or sing along to. Usually my intent is for people to dance or sing, its not necessarily supposed to be the main attention grabber for the party, but add to the ambiance.
reason_for_going_to_parties: To socialise, dance, have fun, and relax.
